one_time_description: Treaty Land Entitlement settlement proceeds recognized in year ($3,294,184 actual vs $48,224,377 prior year which included large transfer to trust)
economic_notes: AWZ37 Ventures Inc. and AWZ37 Limited Partnership formed in 2021 for economic development. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributes 1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues. Subsequent to year-end, First Nation settled a flooding claim for approximately $156 million against Federal and Ontario governments; to be recognized in fiscal 2023.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2022 — audit report dated March 7, 2024 (nearly 2 years late; non-compliance with FNFTA noted). Two subsidiaries consolidated: AWZ37 Ventures Inc. and AWZ37 Limited Partnership (both formed 2021). Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership accounted for at nominal value (GBE). Large $156M flooding claim settlement occurred subsequent to year-end, to be recognized in FY2023. Prior year (2021) revenue was exceptionally high (~$73M) due to Treaty Land Entitlement settlement of ~$48M and transfer to trust of ~$30M. Net debt position at year-end is -$291,051 (near breakeven). Restricted cash estimated includes CMHC reserves ($239,422), Ottawa Trust Fund ($94,628), and RBC Community Development accounts ($1,132,103). No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
